name: Molasses-Ginger Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Cream together the softened butter or margarine and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Stir in molasses and egg; mix well.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, ginger, salt, and baking soda into a separate bowl.
5. Mix dry ingredients into the creamed mixture alternately with water, stirring until just combined.
6. Fold in raisins.
7. Pour batter evenly into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
8. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown and firm when tested.
9. Remove from oven and let cool completely.
10. Sprinkle powdered sugar over the bars before cutting.
Makes 36 bars.
